title: should auto-pick an FTS default column on fresh navigation
verifies: Fresh navigation to logs auto-picks an FTS text column instead of the generic source column

title: should render source column in SQL mode (no FTS auto-pick)
verifies: SQL mode bypasses FTS auto-pick and renders the generic source column

title: should clear system-pick flag when user adds a field and user choice persists
verifies: User adding a field clears the auto-pick flag and the user's choice persists across subsequent searches

title: should re-enable auto-pick after resetting selected fields
verifies: Resetting selected fields re-enables FTS auto-pick on the next search

title: should re-evaluate auto-pick after reset filters
verifies: Reset filters button clears the auto-pick flag and the next search re-evaluates

title: should drop auto-pick column when entering SQL mode
verifies: Toggling SQL mode with an active system-pick drops the auto-pick column and renders source
